# RubRhythm

> Body rub and massage provider directory across the United States.

RubRhythm is a peer-to-peer directory connecting independent massage and body rub providers with clients. We do not employ or manage any providers.

## Core Features
- Provider listings with photos, rates, services, and location
- City-based search across 250+ US cities
- Identity verification system (free, government ID)
- Credit-based economy ($1 = 1 credit)
- Featured, Highlighted, and Bump Up listing boosts
- Real-time "Available Now" status
- Anonymous and direct messaging
- Referral program

## Pricing
- Account creation: Free
- Post a listing: 10 credits ($10)
- Bump Up (24h): 5 credits
- Highlight (7 days): 10 credits
- Highlight (30 days): 30 credits
- Feature (7 days): 15-20 credits
- Feature (30 days): 45-60 credits
- Verification: Free

## Popular Cities
New York, Los Angeles, Las Vegas, Miami, Chicago, Houston, Atlanta, Phoenix, Dallas, San Francisco, Orlando, Denver, San Diego, Seattle, Philadelphia, Tampa
